page_content:
Formerly: WMST336.

WGSS348 Literary Works by Women (3 Credits)

The context, form, style and meaning of literary works by women. Prerequisite: Must have completed at least one lower-level English literature course and one other lower-level English course; or Permission of the Harriet Tubman Department of Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies.

Cross-listed with: ENGL348.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
